english: Guangdong; a province in southern China

etymology.description: 廣(廣) (guǎng, "broad; vast") refers to the wide and expansive nature of the area. 東(東) (dōng, "east") indicates the geographical direction, as Guangdong is located in the eastern part of the Lingnan region.
etymology.interpretation: 廣東(廣東) (Guǎngdōng, "Guangdong") reflects the provincial name noting its vast expanse and location in the eastern section of the Lingnan cultural area. Historically, this region was recognized for its significance as a gateway and pivotal area in China's southern coast.

examples.chinese: 廣東的菜非常有名(廣東的菜非常有名)。
他出生于廣東省(他出生於廣東省)，后来搬到了北京(後來搬到了北京)。
examples.pinyin: Tā chūshēng yú Guǎngdōng shěng, hòulái bān dào le Běijīng.
examples.english: He was born in Guangdong province and later moved to Beijing.

examples.chinese: 每年春節時(每年春節時)，很多人在廣東旅行(很多人在廣東旅行)。
examples.pinyin: Měinián chūnjié shí, hěn duō rén zài Guǎngdōng lǚxíng.
examples.english: Many people travel to Guangdong during the Spring Festival every year.
